ordinanceLabel: Redwood City Municipal Code (RCMC) · Municode · Chapter 9 (Building) · Chapter 12 (Fire) · Zoning Code Article 37 (ADU) · Reach Code Ord. 522 (2020, amended Nov 2022)
fireAgency: Redwood City Fire Department (RCFD) — Fire Prevention Bureau · City-operated (not county contracted) · Plan check at Building Counter, 1017 Middlefield Rd · Fire flow test required for ADUs (allow up to 6 weeks)
utility: PG&E (Pacific Gas and Electric) · Electric + gas utility · All-electric reach code mandates no gas in new construction
